title: Fix Column Label Naming and Hide Internal ID Column
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want column labels to be clean and professional, so that the UI looks polished during demos and daily use.
description:
## Changes
1. Capitalize "description" to "Description" in column headers.
2. Hide the "Report" column — its IDs are not business-friendly.
3. Rename "Col Explanation" column header to "Definition".
acceptance_criteria: Report column is hidden from the table view
Col Explanation column is renamed to Definition
ux_changes: Capitalized 'Description' header, hidden 'Report' column, renamed 'Col Explanation' to 'Definition'.
implementation_notes: Label changes deployed to staging and production. Feature was not yet available to customers on production at the time.
comment_summary: Reporter requested prioritization for upcoming demos. Developer completed on staging and pushed to production, noting the feature was not yet customer-facing in production.
